scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/gameData.js && node --check server.js
scripts.test:boss-assets: node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/validate_boss01_directional_assets.py && node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/validate_boss_directional_assets.py && node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/validate_boss_keyframes.py && node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/validate_boss_special_attacks.py && node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/validate_boss_asset_registry.py
scripts.build:generated-maps: node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/blueprint_to_godot_runtime.py && node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/render_generated_godot_runtime_preview.py && node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/render_ch01_setpiece_preview.py
scripts.test:generated-maps: node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/validate_generated_godot_runtime.py && node tools/run_python_tool.mjs tools/probe_ch01_generated_route.py
scripts.test: npm run check && node tests/game-data.test.mjs && node tests/static-smoke.test.mjs && node tests/runtime-smoke.test.mjs
